summary: Focused re-test round confirming round-1's 4 fixed findings hold hands-on: build/typecheck clean, 109/109 unit + 10/10 e2e green (up from 99/8, includes the TEST-002 regression test now passing). TEST-001 (major, edges-through-nodes): visually confirmed in a real browser on fixtures/state-machine.mmd (static SVG + interactive HTML) that the 'retry' back-edge now routes around the 'Response OK?' box with a fully legible label; automated overlap scan across 5 fixtures/adversarial graphs shows 0 edge-through-node overlaps (down from 3/1/17). TEST-002 (major, toolbar buttons): confirmed with real CDP-level pointer clicks that fit/zoom-in/zoom-out all change the transform; background pan, node drag, and minimap recenter regression-checked with zero console errors. TEST-004 (CLI zero-node error) and TEST-005 (ASCII corners) both re-confirmed at the CLI/ASCII-output level. All four flipped to terminal 'verified'; TEST-003 stays 'wontfix' untouched. No new findings. PASS against the done-bar.
